description: Archived resolved residuals from V1.31 post-QC tech-debt batch. V1.35 P0 (commits aafe1f8, 26b2fa8) closed TD-V131-01, TD-V131-03, TD-V131-04.

entries.title: Non-atomic queue claim race — claim_prompt_injections SELECT-then-UPDATE without transaction
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — claim_prompt_injections now wraps SELECT + UPDATE in a SQLite transaction.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; prompt_injection tests cover concurrent claim path.

entries.title: Unbounded IN clause in mark_prompt_injections_consumed
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit aafe1f8) — batch limit 100 with chunking; runtime SQL guarded by constant column lists and bound params.
entries.closure_evidence: commit aafe1f8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; mark_prompt_injections_consumed tests cover >100 ids input.

entries.title: Unbounded prompt size in build_summary_prompt — memory/IPC risk
entries.target: Resolved by V1.35 P0 (commit 26b2fa8) — content size truncation at 256 KiB with explicit [truncated at N bytes] marker; 2 new tests cover normal and oversized input.
entries.closure_evidence: commit 26b2fa8 on feature/v1.35-critical-residual-convergence; context_summarize tests assert 256 KiB cap.
